title: Mystical experiences during magnesium-Ibogaine are associated with improvements in PTSD symptoms in veterans.

assets.abstract: Ibogaine is an atypical psychedelic that evokes unique subjective effects, including mystical experiences. Mystical experiences have shown a mediating effect on clinical improvements following treatment with several psychedelic substances; however, the relationship between mystical experiences and clinical outcomes following ibogaine remains unclear. We examined the association between mystical experiences during ibogaine and subsequent changes in PTSD severity. We also explored the relationship

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Bridge paper score=7.0: links Liberation/Enlightenment concept to mechanistic neuroscience
